g.text: Cell Pointers | From End of Header
Cell[N-1] | 2 bytes | Offset to last cell
Free Space | Grows from both directions
Cell Content | Grows Upward from Page End
Bidirectional growth: pointers grow up, content grows down
• Cell pointers: 2 bytes each, stored at end of header
• Cell content: stored at cell_content_start, grows down
• Free space: gap between pointer array and content
